tasks.label: web:dev (restart)
tasks.command: pids=($(lsof -ti tcp:5173 2>/dev/null)); if (( ${#pids[@]} )); then kill -9 $pids; fi; cd /Users/chyngyz/Desktop/ruts_project/apps/web && npm run dev

tasks.label: api:dev (restart)
tasks.command: pids=($(lsof -ti tcp:8000 2>/dev/null)); if (( ${#pids[@]} )); then kill -9 $pids; fi; cd /Users/chyngyz/Desktop/ruts_project/apps/api && /Users/chyngyz/Desktop/ruts_project/.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
